novel_features.name: Cross-video transcript search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across every cached clip transcript in your workspace; returns video, clip, and timecode hits in milliseconds.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local SQLite store of transcripts populated by sync; the official MCP and stateless API would need to refetch every transcript for every query.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent or human needs to find every video that mentioned a topic without rehydrating the workspace from the API.

novel_features.name: Watch-milestone digest
novel_features.description: Roll up webhook view-milestone events into a per-video summary over a window (e.g. who crossed 75% in the last 7 days).
novel_features.rationale: Joins locally cached webhook_messages with videos; the webhook surface only fires individual events, no built-in rollup.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this in a sales follow-up loop to triage prospects by engagement without scanning the dashboard.

novel_features.name: Webhook tail + replay
novel_features.description: Stream new webhook events from the inbox to stdout, and replay any prior message to a local URL with valid HMAC headers — no public tunnel needed.
novel_features.rationale: Combines the real /webhooks/messages list+get with the endpoint signing-secret to reproduce HMAC-signed deliveries locally; replaces ngrok for dev and supports replay after handler crashes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when developing a webhook handler against Tella without exposing localhost via a tunnel.

novel_features.name: Bulk standard edit pass
novel_features.description: Apply a chained set of edits (remove-fillers, trim-silences-gt N, blur preset) across every clip in a playlist in one command.
novel_features.rationale: Composes real per-clip mutation endpoints (remove-fillers, silences, cut) over a playlist iterator; the API and MCP only operate per-clip.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to apply a creator's standard edit pass across an entire playlist without per-clip clicking.

novel_features.name: Transcript diff (cut vs uncut)
novel_features.description: Diff a clip's cut transcript against its uncut transcript to surface every word that editing removed (filler, silence, hand-edit) with timecodes.
novel_features.rationale: Calls the real cut and uncut transcript endpoints and computes a token diff in-process; no API call returns this comparison directly.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to audit what an automated edit pass actually changed before publishing.

novel_features.name: Exports waitlist
novel_features.description: Kick off exports for one or more videos and block until each is ready, short-circuiting on the Export ready webhook event.
novel_features.rationale: Combines real POST exports with local webhook_messages cache so waiting for N exports doesn't busy-poll the API.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this in batch publishing scripts that need export URLs for downstream uploads.

novel_features.name: Caption-file export
novel_features.description: Format a clip's cut transcript as an SRT or VTT subtitle file ready to attach to an embed or upload.
novel_features.rationale: Deterministic conversion of Tella's word-timecoded transcript JSON into the standard caption formats; no API endpoint emits SRT/VTT directly.
novel_features.example: tella-pp-cli clips captions clp_abc --format srt > captions.srt
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to ship caption files alongside video embeds without round-tripping through a separate caption tool.

novel_features.name: Workspace stats
novel_features.description: Local aggregate of video count, clip count, total duration, transcript word count, and export count by month across the cached workspace.
novel_features.rationale: Pure SQLite aggregate over locally synced tables; the API has no equivalent rollup endpoint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this for monthly creator-economy reports without dashboard scraping.

narrative.headline: Every Tella API operation behind one CLI, with a local SQLite store, FTS5 transcript search, and webhook tooling that replaces ngrok.
narrative.value_prop: Tella ships an API and an official MCP server; this CLI gives you both surfaces in one binary, plus a local-first store that makes cross-video transcript search, view-milestone rollups, and webhook replay actually fast. Every endpoint is a Cobra command, every command emits structured JSON, and every mutation supports --dry-run.
narrative.auth_narrative: Set TELLA_API_KEY to your Tella account API key (Account → Settings → API). Sent as Authorization: Bearer on every call. No OAuth, no refresh — it's a single static token.

quickstart.comment: Verify TELLA_API_KEY is set and the API is reachable.
Sanity-check that you can see your workspace.
Populate the local SQLite store; required for transcript search and milestone digest.
Pull every clip's cut transcript into the local store with an FTS5 index.
Offline FTS5 search across every cached transcript.
Take a single snapshot of the webhook inbox; --follow streams continuously.

troubleshoots.fix: Re-fetch your API key at tella.tv → Account → Settings → API and run `tella-pp-cli auth set-token` again.
Run `tella-pp-cli sync` first to populate the local transcripts table.
Confirm a webhook endpoint is registered (`tella-pp-cli webhooks endpoint create`); the inbox only collects events for registered endpoints.
The playlist may be empty or the silence threshold (--trim-silences-gt) is larger than every gap; run `clips silences --playlist <id>` to inspect raw ranges.
Default timeout is 10m. Long videos can exceed; pass `--timeout 30m` and ensure the Export ready webhook endpoint is registered for early termination.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for tella-pp-cli when you need agent-shaped Tella operations: scripted batch edits across a playlist, cross-video transcript search for an agent, webhook handler development without a tunnel, or programmatic export pipelines. The local SQLite store makes it ideal when an agent will issue many small queries against the same workspace.

recipes.title: Find every video where a topic was discussed
recipes.explanation: FTS5 over cached transcripts; --select narrows the response to the fields an agent needs.

recipes.title: Roll up which prospects watched 75% this week
recipes.explanation: Reads cached webhook view-milestone events grouped by video and viewer.

recipes.title: Apply a creator's standard edit pass to a playlist
recipes.explanation: Default mode prints the plan; add --apply to actually fire the per-clip mutations.

recipes.title: Develop a webhook handler without ngrok
recipes.explanation: Replays a stored webhook message to a local URL with valid HMAC headers; --dry-run prints the planned POST without sending. Get the msg-id from `tella-pp-cli webhooks tail --once --json`.

recipes.title: Export captions for a clip
recipes.command: tella-pp-cli clips captions clp_abc --video vid_xyz --format srt > captions.srt
recipes.explanation: Formats the cut transcript as a standard SRT file.
